details.test: Task 1: High-priority double charge billing issue via email
Task 2: Technical support for mobile app crashes using fastest contact method
Task 3: Low-priority website design feedback with no reply requested
Task 4: EU account deletion and data removal request
Task 5: Shipping address change for recent order using phone contact
Task 6: Escalate an unresolved support ticket with highest priority
Task 7: Report a web app bug where favorites are not saving in Chrome
Task 8: Request detailed invoice copy for past purchase with business details
Task 9: Schedule onboarding call using earliest available date and morning time
